kept.text:
People are selling hardware stocks because OpenAI missed 2025 revenue and user target..

Meanwhile $GOOG Cloud CEO says compute wil be supply constrained for the next 10 years.

OpenAI’s blunder is a result of company level missteps, particularly lack of product focus. It doesn’t bode ill for the broader demand.

Anthropic revenue tripled in three months, validating broader demand.

Being short compute and hardware is probably the biggest mistake you can make now.

profile_bio.description: Investor | The founder & writer of the Capitalist-Letters newsletter read in +180 countries

quoted_tweet.text:
Stocks are down big this morning on a WSJ report that OpenAI missed internal revenue targets at the end of 2025.

Few thoughts on why this might not be as bad as it is being interpreted:

- Part of the reason OpenAI did not meet its revenue backlog is because they did not have the proper compute needs. Jassy, Dario, and Altman have all said if they have more compute, they could grow faster. The bottleneck of energy/power/land seems to be a much bigger story than “missing revenue targets” because if the compute constrains are the reason for the miss, that’s an issue with supply, not demand.

- Maybe OpenAI missed internal forecasts because of $GOOGL and Anthropic seriously beginning to take marketshare. If that is true, that is NOT bearish semis/ai, that is more bearish OpenAI. The compute will just shift from OpenAI spending to Anthropic and Google spending. So, if OpenAI cancels a datacenter, it’s bad for the parties involved but if Google ends up taking up that datacenter, the same money continues to be spent on all the different providers that go into building out that compute. 

- $SOXX just did 18 green days in a row. It was looking for ANY reason to sell off. Obviously some names have just gotten way ahead of themselves, for example $ARM, which began to trade at 70 p/s. The WSJ article may have been what was needed to give a reason to a selloff which quite frankly did not need a reason after the run it’s had.

Overall, feels more like a general headline about a company not fully living up to its expectations vs a systematic issue around compute constraints. 

Big Tech reports on Wednesday and all eyes will be on what they have to say around capex, roi, growth, and more.

$NVDA $AMD $MSFT $META $ORCL

kept.text:
$GOOG
Google ve Pentagon Arasında Kritik Yapay Zeka İş Birliği

Google, ABD Savunma Bakanlığı (Pentagon) ile yapay zeka modellerinin gizli askeri operasyonlarda kullanılmasına olanak tanıyan kapsamlı bir anlaşmaya imza attı. 

Bugün itibarıyla detayları netleşen bu protokol uyarınca teknoloji devi, hükümetin talebi doğrultusunda yapay zeka güvenlik ayarlarını ve filtrelerini askeri ihtiyaçlara göre uyarlamayı kabul etti. 

Anlaşma, Google’ın Gemini AI modellerinin görev planlamadan hedef belirlemeye kadar geniş bir yelpazede "her türlü yasal hükümet amacı" için kullanılmasının önünü açtı.

Bu gelişme, Google içerisinde ciddi bir etik tartışmayı da beraberinde getirdi. Şirketin DeepMind biriminde görevli araştırmacıların da aralarında bulunduğu 600’den fazla çalışan, CEO Sundar Pichai’ye bir muhtıra göndererek anlaşmanın iptal edilmesini talep etti. 

Çalışanlar, 2018 yılındaki Project Maven protestoları sonrası yayınlanan "saldırı amaçlı silahlarda yapay zeka kullanılmayacağına" dair şirket ilkelerinin çiğnendiğini savundu. Ancak yönetimin, Microsoft ve Palantir gibi rakiplerin savunma sanayisindeki hakimiyetine karşı stratejik bir hamle olarak bu gizli projede yer alma kararlılığını sürdürdüğü kaydedildi.

quoted_tweet.text:
$GOOGL
Google, Pentagon’un Gizli Ağlarına Yapay Zeka Desteğini Artırıyor

Google, yapay zeka modellerini ABD Savunma Bakanlığı’nın (Pentagon) en yüksek güvenlikli ve gizli ağlarına entegre etmek üzere kapsamlı bir anlaşma imzaladı. 

Daha önce sadece açık ağlarda asistan hizmeti sunan teknoloji devi, bu yeni hamleyle Gemini modellerini operasyonel planlama, istihbarat analizi ve siber savunma gibi kritik askeri görevlerin hizmetine sundu.

tweet.text:
My top 6 positions currently make up ~55% of my main portfolio:

$RKLB
$IONQ
$AAPL
$PLTR
$AMZN
$GOOG

the rest of the port is diversified across a couple dozen positions all with ~1-3% allocation

Losers ultimately get cut, I let winners ride, and I add selectively on dips. Recently, I also started scraping profits more often on pumps.

Managing a portfolio of this size is practically a full time job. But I love it, it keeps me busy, and its outperformed S&P by a long shot for many years 😎

I know stock picking isn't for everyone. If I didn't have the time and patience for this strategy, I'd rely a lot heavier on indexes 😆 and I'm super happy to have my X audience to share the journey 🤝

tweet.text:
$GOOG 財報在即，但市場參與者相對有那麼一點冷清。左上圖和右下圖都是兩年期的波動率分析，我們從左上圖的黃線圖表，觀察到這次波動率的高點，離上次和上上次財報高點都有相當距離。而右下角的Put/Call波動率差值也顯示，Call的買氣雖佔主導，但也談不上有特別突出的表現。
右上角的短期Put/Call波動率差值顯示主要基調確實是做多，但比起其他科技股，$GOOG的做多相對沒那麼激情。
由於本周04/29是$GOOG財報日，我們就來看本週五到期期權的倉位累積圖(左下角)。$GOOG的股價已經先行表達強勢，現在的股價348.5距離本周期權的最大痛點價格315相當遠，這還不說股價上漲的過程中翻過了行權價320累積口數11000口的多單。
或許，就是因為股價已經先有了一段強勢走勢，才讓本周的多軍，多了幾分謹慎。
